name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-msp

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-msp
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Msp SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Msp SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-msp
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common msp
```

param _DstAccessType: "\u76EE\u6807\u5B9E\u4F8B\u63A5\u5165\u7C7B\u578B\uFF0C\u6570\
  \u636E\u5E93\u8FC1\u79FB\u65F6\u586B\u5199\u503C\u4E3A\uFF1Aextranet(\u5916\u7F51\
  ),cvm(cvm\u81EA\u5EFA\u5B9E\u4F8B),dcg(\u4E13\u7EBF\u63A5\u5165\u7684\u5B9E\u4F8B\
  ),vpncloud(\u4E91vpn\u63A5\u5165\u7684\u5B9E\u4F8B),vpnselfbuild(\u81EA\u5EFAvpn\u63A5\
  \u5165\u7684\u5B9E\u4F8B)\uFF0Ccdb(\u4E91\u4E0Acdb\u5B9E\u4F8B)"

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.TaskType
documentation:
任务类型，取值database（数据库迁移）、file（文件迁移）、host（主机迁移）
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.TaskName
documentation:
任务名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.ServiceSupplier
documentation:
服务提供商名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.CreateTime
documentation:
迁移任务创建时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.UpdateTime
documentation:
迁移任务更新时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.MigrateClass
documentation:
迁移类别，如数据库迁移中mysql:mysql代表从mysql迁移到mysql，文件迁移中oss:cos代表从阿里云oss迁移到腾讯云cos
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.SrcInfo
documentation:

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.DstInfo
documentation:

\:rtype: {class}`tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.DstInfo`

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.SrcAccessType
documentation:
源实例接入类型，数据库迁移时填写值为：extranet(外网),cvm(cvm自建实例),dcg(专线接入的实例),vpncloud(云vpn接入的实例),vpnselfbuild(自建vpn接入的实例)，cdb(云上cdb实例)
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.SrcDatabaseType
documentation:
源实例数据库类型，数据库迁移时填写，取值为mysql,redis,percona,mongodb,postgresql,sqlserver,mariadb 之一
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.DstAccessType
documentation:
目标实例接入类型，数据库迁移时填写值为：extranet(外网),cvm(cvm自建实例),dcg(专线接入的实例),vpncloud(云vpn接入的实例),vpnselfbuild(自建vpn接入的实例)，cdb(云上cdb实例)
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskRequest.DstDatabaseType
documentation:
目标实例数据库类型,数据库迁移时填写，取值为mysql,redis,percona,mongodb,postgresql,sqlserver,mariadb 之一
\:rtype: str
RegisterMigrationTask请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.msp.v20180319.models.RegisterMigrationTaskResponse.RequestId
documentation:
唯一请求 ID，由服务端生成，每次请求都会返回（若请求因其他原因未能抵达服务端，则该次请求不会获得 RequestId）。定位问题时需要提供该次请求的 RequestId。
\:rtype: str
